entities.name: Hydrogen Principle
entities.context: Metaphor for the most fundamental, abundant element in any system; stripping away noise to achieve radical clarity on what drives value

entities.name: Pareto Principle
entities.context: The 80/20 rule suggesting minority of inputs drive majority of outputs; used as reasoning foundation for Hydrogen concept

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company where the Hydrogen principle should be applied to identify a singular foundational metric

entities.name: First-Principle Component
entities.context: The singular element that underpins everything else in a system; synonymous with the Hydrogen metaphor

entities.name: Strategic Drift
entities.context: Negative outcome that occurs when foundation isn't prioritized; prevented by Hydrogen focus

entities.name: Dilution of Effort
entities.context: What occurs when organizations treat all variables as equally important

relationships.context: This is V's documented worldview position on finding fundamental system components
Pareto provides the reasoning foundation; Hydrogen extends it to logical extreme
Synonymous concepts describing the foundational element
V believes Careerspan should identify its singular Hydrogen metric and deprioritize secondary initiatives
Applying Hydrogen focus prevents strategic drift
Hydrogen focus prevents treating all variables as equally important
